title: Cornish Pastry Puffs
description: A sweet and flaky pastry treat filled with a hint of sour and adventurous flavors.
instructions: Roll out the Cornish Pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out small squares of pastry, about 3 inches per side.
In a small bowl, mix together the Sour Cream, Pepper, and Adventurous Spice Blend.
Place a small spoonful of the Sour Cream mixture onto one half of each pastry square.
Fold the other half of the pastry square over the filling to form a triangle.
Use a fork to crimp the edges of the pastry and press a small hole in the center to allow steam to escape.
Place the pastry puffs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the pastry puffs with a little bit of water and sprinkle with Granulated Sugar.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
